items.title: Save hundreds on Segway e-scooters during this Spring Sale event, like the Max G2 at $650 (Reg. $1,000), more from $150
items.summary:
Segway has launched its official Spring Sale with up to 55% discounts, giving folks even lower prices than its usual discounts so you can secure your new ride and start your spring adventures off right. One notable price cut is hitting Segway’s popular MAX G2 Electric Scooter and dropping it to $649.99 shipped, matching its Amazon pricing. You may see it bearing a $1,400 MSRP tag, but that rate is usually reduced to $1,000, with most of the discounts over the last year having kept prices above $750, with occasional drops to $700, less frequent falls to $650 (last seen during Christmas sales), and the one-time-only cut to a $530 that happened for a single day in December. Today’s deal gives you the next-best price from that low, saving you $350 off the going rate and even beating out its Black Friday pricing. Head below to learn why this model is so popular among riders, and also to browse the full lineup of deals.

Also, Best Buy Plus and Total members will receive a $50 bonus reward credit with this purchase – or any PC or Mac priced above $499, for a limited time. This particular configuration with AMD’s Ryzen AI 9 365 processor, 24GB of RAM, and a 1TB SSD typically sells for $1,500, so you’re looking at a straight-up $550 discount right now. Today’s deal also drops it $50 below its previous all-time low and our mention from last month, marking a new best price to date. It’s also a particularly solid price to snag this machine at, considering the same laptop with a relatively less powerful Ryzen AI 7 350 processor and 16GB RAM itself is currently going for $1,229 at Amazon. It remains one of the most powerful laptops you can get your hands on right now, and you can learn more about it in detail below.
